_instructions: Copy this file to examples/<resource-key>/source-contract.json. Every field below must be answered before Phase 1 sign-off; null values block Phase 2 dry-run.
_sourceOfTruthForNote: List the canonical fields/objects this source is authoritative for. External fields not listed here cannot be promoted to Helm canonical truth.
_writeBackAllowedNote: Default false. Setting true requires independent official-write review per Phase 5.

reportSkillRef._note: If this source is a BI report consumed via report-skills/, reference key/version here. Do NOT inline query.sql / prompt / criteria — those live in report-skills/.
